message:
fix: move syncCommandContext() before staleness check so --allow-stale works (bd-f49)

syncCommandContext() was called after the staleness check, so isAllowStale()
read the zero-value cmdCtx.AllowStale instead of the flag-bound global.
Moving the sync earlier ensures the flag value propagates before the check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
